completion_rule: A source is complete when it is ACTIVE with verified records, CODE_READY with documented activation requirements, BLOCKED_AUTH with explicit authorized-access requirements, or deliberately classified as PLANNED or DEPRECATED.
rules: Use only public documented endpoints, public pages that permit access, or explicitly authorized feeds/APIs.
Never invent price, stock, availability, profit or ROI.
Keep sale listings, bankruptcy leads and auction-event leads in separate channels.
Economic evaluation and ranking may run only for records whose required evidence is verified.
Source expansion must not block safe evaluation of already verified records.
No automatic purchase, bid or external financial action is permitted.
